rationale: createRichText body lines must not be mapped to 0 by V8 source-line conversion.
deepFreeze primitive, recursive object, and freeze-return paths must retain source-line hits.
function-valued highlighter message builders must retain source-line hits under native ESM.
highlighter runtime action registry must be covered through the formal config ESM boundary.
mergeDataSourceConfig local-first and sync-fallback lines must retain source-line hits.
save status normalization, capability resolution, and response construction must retain source-line hits.
content extraction selector and limit registries must be covered through formal config source paths.
mock-dependent native ESM branch must retain source-line hits.
